'''dhawoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swainmote|swainmote]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swainmote|swainmote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhawoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæweketh|dhæweketh]] || [[word:dhæwekej|dhæwekej]] || [[word:dhæwekesh|dhæwekesh]] || [[word:dhæweke|dhæweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawowokoth|dhawowokoth]] || [[word:dhawowokoj|dhawowokoj]] || [[word:dhawowokosh|dhawowokosh]] || [[word:dhawowoko|dhawowoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawokoth|dhawokoth]] || [[word:dhawokoj|dhawokoj]] || [[word:dhawokosh|dhawokosh]] || [[word:dhawoko|dhawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawofkoth|dhawofkoth]] || [[word:dhawofkoj|dhawofkoj]] || [[word:dhawofkosh|dhawofkosh]] || [[word:dhawofkof|dhawofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawokotho|dhawokotho]] || [[word:dhawokojo|dhawokojo]] || [[word:dhawokosho|dhawokosho]] || [[word:dhawokoko|dhawokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawokoth|dhawokoth]] || [[word:dhawokoj|dhawokoj]] || [[word:dhawokosh|dhawokosh]] || [[word:dhawoko|dhawoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawokothol|dhawokothol]] || [[word:dhawokojol|dhawokojol]] || [[word:dhawokoshol|dhawokoshol]] || [[word:dhawokokol|dhawokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawokothotho|dhawokothotho]] || [[word:dhawokojojo|dhawokojojo]] || [[word:dhawokoshosho|dhawokoshosho]] || [[word:dhawokoko|dhawokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawokothon|dhawokothon]] || [[word:dhawokojon|dhawokojon]] || [[word:dhawokoshon|dhawokoshon]] || [[word:dhawokokon|dhawokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawokothoro|dhawokothoro]] || [[word:dhawokojoro|dhawokojoro]] || [[word:dhawokoshoro|dhawokoshoro]] || [[word:dhawokokoro|dhawokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
